title: Weather Talk
opening: Hello! How is the weather today?

t1.prompt: Hello! How is the weather today?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! — Hello! How is the weather today? — What is the weather like now?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry? Can you say that again, please?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry? — Pardon me? Can you say that again, please? — Please repeat what you said.

t2_sunny_plan.prompt: Oh, nice! What do you like to do on a sunny day?
t2_sunny_plan.promptTranslation: Oh, nice! — Oh, good! What do you like to do? — What activities do you prefer? On a sunny day? — When the sun is shining?

t3_bad_weather_info.prompt: Oh, I see. Is it cold, or is it rainy?
t3_bad_weather_info.promptTranslation: Oh, I see. — I understand. Is it cold? — Is the temperature low? Or is it rainy? — Is it raining?

t4_cold_activity.prompt: It is cold. Do you stay home?
t4_cold_activity.promptTranslation: It is cold. — The air temperature is low. Do you stay home? — Do you remain inside your house?

t5_rainy_activity.prompt: It is rainy. Do you use an umbrella?
t5_rainy_activity.promptTranslation: It is rainy. — Water is falling from the sky. Do you use an umbrella? — Do you hold a device that protects you from rain?

t-end.prompt: Okay, thank you! Have a good day!
t-end.promptTranslation: Okay, thank you! — Alright, I appreciate it! Have a good day! — I wish you a pleasant day!
